label: Fixed
items: AI Area Coach now reliably fills in every plant's soil moisture, EC and temperature targets — previously only some values filled in and they could drift between refreshes.
Automations paused by their own run limit now show a clear "Rate limited" entry in the run history, instead of silently showing nothing.

label: Improved
items: AI Area Coach now lists each plant once (not once per copy) and shows that plant's own recommended moisture, EC and temperature range.
The automation builder's "Complete task" action now uses the same searchable, tappable task chips as the trigger — no more long dropdown.
